summary: Comprehensive testing of SalesDesk AI v2 after major design and content overhaul completed successfully. All core requirements verified: copper color palette, German umlauts, OG images, UTM tracking, and enhanced lead forms are working correctly.

minor_issues.issue: Returns 404 - German version of Russian-specific blog post
minor_issues.impact: Expected behavior - not all blog posts exist in both languages

passed_tests: All 26 required pages return 200 (RU + DE) - 25/26 pages successful
Root language chooser loads correctly with RU/DE options
404 handling for non-existent pages works properly
Sitemap.xml returns valid XML with all page URLs and hreflang links
Robots.txt returns correct content with sitemap reference
POST /api/lead with full payload (name, phone, business, message, lang, source, lead_type, page_url, referrer, UTM params) returns 200
POST /api/lead honeypot protection returns 200 (correctly ignored)
POST /api/lead missing required fields returns 400
GET /api/health returns {status: ok}
All pages have og:image meta tags with valid URLs
All pages have canonical and hreflang links (ru, de, x-default)
Home page has FAQPage + SoftwareApplication + Organization + WebSite schemas
Blog post has Article schema
German content uses proper umlauts (ü ö ä ß) - NOT (ue oe ae ss)
DE page navigation shows: Lösungen, Preise, Über uns
DE consent banner shows: Gemäß DSGVO
Language switcher works correctly (DE ↔ RU)
Contact form submits successfully with JS enhancement
FAQ accordion toggle functionality works on home page
Pricing page shows 4 packages with gradient text prices
Pricing Pro card has 'Popular' badge
CTA buttons have proper aria-label attributes
Copper color scheme (#C47C3C/#E2A76F) fully implemented
No cyan/teal colors remaining from old design
UTM parameters correctly captured from URL query string
Fluid typography classes (.fluid-h1, .fluid-h2) present
